transcript.clean_text: thank you the first road stage of the general Italia started in terramore legit Italian returning after a few years to the city in Northern Abruzzo before heading south towards San Salvo Marina for the stage two looked like it was going to be a day with remcovennable conserving his pink jersey and the sprinters such as Fernando gavilia fighting it out for a win Kevin Groves was there to try and challenge in those Sprints as well Mark cavadish a 16-time stage winner and a former winner in tiramo setting off from the town in which he won a stage in 2011. garine Thomas remcool and the rest were all ready for a 202 kilometer Journey heading towards San Salvo Marina a one-star stage one of the easiest stages on paper at least with a couple of fourth category climbs two intermediate Sprints a brief trip Inland at 1800 meters of climbing over the course of the day stage two on paper then one for the sprinters an easy break went with the first few pedal Strokes four Riders to go away one try to join and manage to get across that made it five with the second youngest rider in the race alessandrovere trying to get ahead and trying to pick up King of the mountain points a day before a trip into his home basilikata region Trixie Alfredo alpacinda kunic Dear Summer movie star with the teams to do most of the chasing and up the road most of the attacking was done by Paul La perra the young French Rider from Normandy 22 years of age on Juno debut and taking the king of the mountains Jersey a big effort on that first clinder silvi Paez here meant that Alessandro verre was sent back to the Peloton at the intermediate Sprints it would be gandhin a rider Racing for koratec sale Italia who'd take both of them kaviria would be the best of the main Bunch behind on the malachik amino points when it came to the Sprint in kieti that'd be a real fight for the points but it was at the second king of the mountains confirmed his King of the mountains Jersey on his first ever Grand Tour Road stage he was brought back with 50ks to go the rest of the Breakaway caught with 38 kilometers remaining and then the nerves the tension the aggression started to rise narrowing roads were always going to present problems and they did with 3.7 kilometers remaining just 700 meters from the safety of the three kilometer passage and the same time taken this meant that GC riders or some at least caught behind they're going to lose time for the rest up the front avoiding things including Eve Nepal and roglich Garrett Thomas there as well they were brought home by the sprinters Mark Cavendish missing out after being caught up in the crash and when the sprinters who were left had a go Bobby Grove should be led out by single Dem gavilia going on his own Arna malet was there as was Pascal Ackerman but coming stronger through the center just ahead of David Decker would be yonatan Milan Grand Tour debut first road stage and Agility Talia stage won by an enthusiastic proud and delighted Italian a star on the track an Olympic champion now a well-known man on the road Jonathan Milan with a power Sprint in San Salvo Marina taking the first road stage and the first Sprint of this Victorious his first victory since he took one in the month of February and look at what it meant to us Milan Decker grows with Maritime myroford in the top five akaman gavilia vonifacio Stuart and Matthews rounding out the top ten on a crash affected stage two if Nepal remained in the pink jersey his lead very much the same 22 seconds heading over the second place Rider who remained Phillip Ghana there at 22 Almeida 29 gagan heart losing time dropping from 4th to eighth McNulty and Vine also dropping a play seat as vlasov moved up into Seventh Place La peda the new king of the mountains heading into stage three as you deserve having won the Jersey a couple of years ago and going now into stage three could well be a Sprint again but a harder day in question a three-star stage heading down from Abruzzo into pulia and then to basilikata the first intermediate spend of the day coming at foja then to categorize climbs bonus Sprint towards the end with seconds on offer in the general classification as well and then the possible Sprint finish after a long day 213 kilometers in the saddle between vasto and Melvin as always you can catch every stage of the Gerald Italia across the wdb sports platforms on Eurosport Discovery plus and gcn plus
